description: Style Note Taking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist. Product Details Green sleeveless top with a round neckline and stitch detailing Material and Care 96% cotton and 5% elastane Machine wash in cold water at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
